name: Basic Plan
description: Perfect for individuals looking to start their fitness journey with essential equipment access.
features: Access to all standard cardio & strength equipment
Smart locker room and shower access
Standard gym hours access (6 AM - 10 PM)

name: Standard Plan
description: Our most popular plan designed for consistent trainers who want flexibility and group energy.
features: Everything included in the Basic Plan
Unlimited access to Group Classes (Yoga, Zumba, HIIT)
1 Monthly 1-on-1 session with a Personal Trainer

name: Premium Plan
description: The ultimate VIP experience for members dedicated to maximum results and luxury perks.
features: Everything included in the Standard Plan
Personalized Diet & Nutrition roadmap from an expert
Access to luxury Spa, Sauna, and Steam Room
1 Free VIP Guest Pass per month
Complimentary gym drinks, pre-workouts, and supplements
